de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termgenerator

Class SubtermGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termgenerator.SubtermGenerator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TermGenerator

    public abstract class SubtermGenerator
extends java.lang.Object
implements TermGenerator
    Term generator that enumerates the subterms or subformulas of a given term. Similarly to RecSubTermFeature, a term feature can be given that determines when traversal should be stopped, i.e., when one should not descend further into a term.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected Term getTermInst(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal) 
      static TermGenerator leftTraverse(ProjectionToTerm cTerm, TermFeature cond)
      Left-traverse the subterms of a term in depth-first order.
      static TermGenerator rightTraverse(ProjectionToTerm cTerm, TermFeature cond)
      Right-traverse the subterms of a term in depth-first order.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termgenerator.TermGenerator

        generate

    • Method Detail

      • leftTraverse

        public static TermGenerator leftTraverse(ProjectionToTerm cTerm,
                                         TermFeature cond)
        Left-traverse the subterms of a term in depth-first order. Each term is returned before its proper subterms.

      • rightTraverse

        public static TermGenerator rightTraverse(ProjectionToTerm cTerm,
                                          TermFeature cond)
        Right-traverse the subterms of a term in depth-first order. Each term is returned before its proper subterms.

      • getTermInst

        protected Term getTermInst(RuleApp app,
                           PosInOccurrence pos,
                           Goal goal)
